plant.title: Potted plant

plant.used_for: Reference/demo object for proving real-time visual grounding.

charging cable.title: Charging cable
charging cable.description: A cable that carries power from a charger to a device.

charging port.description: The physical port where a charging cable connects to a device.
charging port.used_for: Receiving power from the charging cable.
